title: NTRD-009 Netorareze The Story Of My Wife Being Stolen By A College Student In The Next Room Yoshie Fujie - Yue Fujie
overview: I'm Akihito, 33 years old. His wife, Yoshie, is 32 years old. I heard that a young man named Yokoyama, a college student who lives alone in the apartment next door to my husband and I, was injured while working part-time at a moving company and was in trouble. I decided to help him, but...
